objective: Stratégie de Scalping sur BNBUSDC 3m. Indicateurs : STOCHASTIC + VWAP + ATR. Scalp quand STOCHASTIC croise en zone extrême avec VWAP aligné. Sortie rapide : take-profit serré (1-1.5x ATR), stop-loss serré (0.5-1x ATR). Long et short. Stop-loss = 1.0x ATR, take-profit = 1.5x ATR (RR 1.5:1).

iterations.hypothesis: The combination of Stochastic RSI crossing in extreme zones with VWAP alignment creates high-probability scalp entry signals. Stochastic identifies momentum reversals in oversold/overbought conditions, while VWAP confirms institutional flow direction. ATR-based risk management ensures consistent risk-reward ratios with tight stops and take-profits that capture short-term volatility spikes without overexposure.
